Delivery Service Integrations

Browse and integrate with delivery service providers

@if (currentTab === 'browse') {
@if (isLoading()) {

Loading delivery services...

} @else if (availableProviders().length === 0) {
local_shipping

No delivery services found

} @else {
@for (provider of availableProviders(); track provider.id) {

{{ provider.name }}

star {{ provider.rating }}/5 ({{ provider.totalDeliveries }} deliveries)

{{ provider.description }}

Coverage

{{ provider.coverageArea }}

@if (provider.serviceCities.length > 0) {

{{ provider.serviceCities.slice(0, 3).join(', ') }}...

}

Pricing

Base Price:

${{ formatPrice(provider.basePrice) }}

Per km:

${{ formatPrice(provider.perKmRate) }}

Features

@if (provider.features.realTimeTracking) {

check Real-time Tracking

} @if (provider.features.temperature_control) {

check Temperature Control

} @if (provider.features.insurance) {

check Insurance

}
}
}
} @if (currentTab === 'integrated') {
@if (integratedServices().length === 0) {
link_off

No integrated delivery services yet

Browse available services above to add one

} @else {
@for (integration of integratedServices(); track integration.id) {

{{ integration.provider.name }}

Status: {{ integration.status | titlecase }}

Integrated: {{ integration.createdAt | date }}

Performance

Total Orders: {{ integration.totalOrders }}

Success Rate: {{ integration.successRate }}%

Rating: {{ integration.averageRating }}/5

@if (!integration.isDefault) { } @else {
Default Service
}
}
}
}
